title: Hydrochloric Acid-Potassium Chloride Buffer Preparation
author: Neilier Junior
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfycjpsw

steps.title: pH Range
steps.instruction: pH Range: pH 1 to pH 2.2 (a) 0.1 M Potassium chloride: 7.45 g L -1 (M.W.: 74.5 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, potassium chloride and indicted volume of hydrochloric acid.

substeps.instruction: M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, potassium chloride and indicted volume of hydrochloric acid.

steps.title: Mix and adjust the final volume...
steps.instruction: Mix and adjust the final volume to 100 mL with deionized water.

steps.title: Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter
steps.instruction: Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter.
